title: RENKE 30 Color Handy Polyester Sewing Threads,Cotton Thread,Durable and Plentiful Supply for Your Sewing Needs(45 m / 50 yds Each roll)
features: 1. Strong and in Plenty of Supply - Our RENKE sewing thread has unparalleled durability and ample supply to meet all your sewing needs.
2. Small Spool, Big Potential - 45 meters at a time! Our spool can hold 45 meters of cotton thread. This space-saving design is perfect for small hand sewing projects.

3. 30 rich colors make color matching simple. Our color combination ranges from light to dark, providing a wide range of choices for any sewing project. With the easy-to-organize transparent box, you can always find the perfect cotton thread color match for any mending task.

4. Convenient China Premium Needle Threader. The China Premium Needle Threader is specially designed to make needle threading very simple. Its sharp tip can accurately aim the eye of the needle, distinguishing it from other needle threaders.
5. Why is it time to buy a new thread kit? Keep clean and enhance the fun while crafting with our premium cotton sewing thread.
